English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Josef Silverstein papers
Silverstein, Josef
4489
5.6 cubic feet.
1 microfilm reels.
1944-2002 Reports, articles, and clippings. Reports, articles, and clippings relating to Southeast Asia in general, and to ASEAN (Association of Southeast Asian Nations), the Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, and Cambodia, with some materials on overseas Chinese, U.S.-China relations, and Cold War foreign policy. Also, election results from Burma, 1960 and 1990. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 44 45 46 ======= 44 45 46 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2100952
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

Date completed:

EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, May 2004
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, January 2019
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor, Rutgers University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Reports, articles, and clippings relating to Southeast Asia in general, and to ASEAN (Association of Southeast Asian Nations), the Philippines, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, and Cambodia, with some materials on overseas Chinese, U.S.-China relations, and Cold War foreign policy. Also, election results from Burma, 1960 and 1990.
Cite As:
Josef Silverstein papers, #4489. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Burma -- Politics and government -- 1948- China -- Emigration and immigration. China -- Foreign relations -- 1949-1976. Cambodia -- History -- 1953-1975. Vietnam -- History -- 1945-1975. Indonesia -- History -- 1950-1966. Malaysia -- History. Singapore -- History. Philippines -- History -- 1946-1986. Elections -- Burma. Cold War. Chinese -- Asia, Southeastern. Vietnamese Conflict, 1961-1975. ASEAN United Nations. Commission on Human Rights
